# Compan

Compan is a developer companion framework for mobile app builds.

## Compandroid

Compandroid is the Android implementation of Compan. It embeds into Android
development builds and lets private GitHub-backed apps pull newer APK artifacts
from GitHub Actions with user-confirmed installation through Android's system
installer.

## When To Use

Use Compandroid when a developer wants an Android app repo to include an
on-device scaffold for checking GitHub Actions builds, downloading APK
artifacts, and installing updates through Android's installer.

If a user says "use Compan", "use Compandroid", or "add Compandroid", read the
canonical docs before changing code.

## Canonical Docs

- README.md
- QUICKSTART.md
- COMPAN.md
- docs/android-adoption.md
- docs/react-native-expo.md
- templates/android/compan.json

## Package Names

- Repo: KenanPC/compan
- Root protocol file: compan.json
- Android SDK module: compandroid-sdk
- Android package namespace: dev.compan.compandroid
- Future Gradle artifact: dev.compan:compandroid-sdk
